title: Customer satisfaction survey
description: we have launched new product , use it and give us your feedback

questions.question: what pain points that you are facing right now ?
what current products that you are using right now ?

title: NPS survey
description: we have launched new product . We are focusing on product Led growth and word of mouth . please do take your time to use product and recommend others to use it.

questions.question: On a scale of 0-10, how likely are you to recommend our product to a friend or colleague?
What is the main reason for your score?

title: user satisfaction survey
description: Measure how satisfied users are with your product experience — covers overall satisfaction, ease of use, and open feedback.

questions.question: How satisfied are you with our product overall?
How easy is it to use our product?
What could we do to improve your experience?
How satisfied are you with our product?

title: Gauge customer intrests
description: Discover what your customers care about — their interests, priorities, and what they want to see next from your brand.

questions.question: Which product categories interest you the most?
How important is pricing when choosing a product?
What features or products would you like to see us launch next?
